promotion_note: Promotion remains blocked until all required evidence files exist and human review confirms adequacy.

slot_status.proves: Desktop viewport renders the runtime surface and output without layout failure.
Mobile viewport renders the runtime surface and output without layout failure.
Uploaded route returns HTTP 200 and the route can fetch required artifacts.
A clearly labeled reviewer, owner, advisor, expert, venue, or Codex technical review note records approval, limits, or remaining defects after inspecting the runtime result.
